description_long: This monument features a tall, rectangular obelisk made of light-colored stone, rising vertically from a multi-tiered, angular base. At the front of the obelisk, there is a bronze or dark metal statue of two human figures, one standing and one kneeling, which adds a commemorative and sculptural element to the structure. The obelisk itself is smooth and unadorned except for an inscription on its front face. The base consists of several steps or platforms, arranged in a geometric pattern, and is set within a rectangular plot of grass bordered by paved walkways. The overall design is solemn and formal, typical of war memorials or civic monuments. The monument is situated in an open, landscaped area, likely intended for public visitation and reflection.
description: A tall, light stone obelisk with a bronze statue of two figures at its base, set on a stepped platform within a grassy, paved area. The structure is formal and commemorative, with an inscription on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the inscription and the two-figure statue at the base, with the stepped platform and grassy surroundings clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the obelisk and the full profile of the statue, with the inscription partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the obelisk and the geometric layout of the base, with no visible statue or inscription.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the statue from a different perspective and the stepped design of the base.
attribute_inscription: There is an inscription on the front face of the obelisk, reading 'Paul Barr', in a simple, sans-serif style. The text is clearly legible and centrally positioned.
attribute_ornamentation: A bronze or dark metal statue of two human figures, one standing and one kneeling, is attached to the front base of the obelisk. No other ornamentation is visible on the obelisk itself.
attribute_base_design: The base is multi-tiered with angular, geometric steps made of stone or concrete, forming a platform that elevates the obelisk and statue. The steps are broad and arranged in a rectangular pattern, with grass and paving surrounding the structure.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is flat and unadorned, maintaining the rectangular cross-section with no decorative features.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a rectangular plot of grass, bordered by paved walkways. No fences or additional statues are visible.
